quotes.text: There is nothing outside of yourself that can ever enable you to get better, stronger, richer, quicker, or smarter. Everything is within. Everything exists. Seek nothing outside of yourself.
quotes.author: Miyamoto Musashi

quotes.text: Think lightly of yourself and deeply of the world.
quotes.author: Miyamoto Musashi

quotes.text: Do nothing that is of no use.
quotes.author: Miyamoto Musashi

quotes.text: The ultimate aim of martial arts is not having to use them.
quotes.author: Miyamoto Musashi

quotes.text: Today is victory over yourself of yesterday; tomorrow is your victory over lesser men.
quotes.author: Miyamoto Musashi

quotes.text: You must understand that there is more than one path to the top of the mountain.
quotes.author: Miyamoto Musashi

quotes.text: In battle, if you make your opponent flinch, you have already won.
quotes.author: Miyamoto Musashi

quotes.text: Get beyond love and grief: exist for the good of man.
quotes.author: Miyamoto Musashi

quotes.text: Do not regret what you have done.
quotes.author: Miyamoto Musashi

quotes.text: It is difficult to understand the universe if you only study one planet.
quotes.author: Miyamoto Musashi

quotes.text: Perception is strong and sight weak. In strategy it is important to see distant things as if they were close and to take a distanced view of close things.
quotes.author: Miyamoto Musashi

quotes.text: If you do not control the enemy, the enemy will control you.
quotes.author: Miyamoto Musashi

quotes.text: You can only fight the way you practice.
quotes.author: Miyamoto Musashi

quotes.text: The true science of martial arts means practicing them in such a way that they will be useful at any time.
quotes.author: Miyamoto Musashi

quotes.text: Step by step, walk the thousand-mile road.
quotes.author: Miyamoto Musashi

quotes.text: Respect Buddha and the gods without counting on their help.
quotes.author: Miyamoto Musashi

quotes.text: Do not sleep under a roof. Carry no money or food. Go alone to places frightening to the common brand of men. Become a criminal of purpose.
quotes.author: Miyamoto Musashi

quotes.text: All man are the same except for their belief in their own selves, regardless of what others may think of them.
quotes.author: Miyamoto Musashi

quotes.text: It may seem difficult at first, but everything is difficult at first.
quotes.author: Miyamoto Musashi

quotes.text: Know your enemy, know his sword.
quotes.author: Miyamoto Musashi

quotes.text: The way is in training. Determine that today you will overcome your self of the day before.
quotes.author: Miyamoto Musashi

quotes.text: In strategy your spiritual bearing must not be any different from normal. Both in fighting and in everyday life you should be determined though calm.
quotes.author: Miyamoto Musashi

quotes.text: Be detached from desire your whole life long.
quotes.author: Miyamoto Musashi

quotes.text: Never let yourself be saddened by a separation.
quotes.author: Miyamoto Musashi

quotes.text: Accept everything just the way it is.
quotes.author: Miyamoto Musashi

quotes.text: Fixation is the way to death. Fluidity is the way to life.
quotes.author: Miyamoto Musashi

quotes.text: To know ten thousand things, know one well.
quotes.author: Miyamoto Musashi

quotes.text: Do not let the body be dragged along by the mind nor the mind be dragged along by the body.
quotes.author: Miyamoto Musashi

quotes.text: Whatever the Way, the master of strategy does not appear fast. Of course, slowness is bad. Really skillful people never get out of time.
quotes.author: Miyamoto Musashi

quotes.text: From one thing, know ten thousand things.
quotes.author: Miyamoto Musashi
